Appearances:
Plaintiff Henry Yee is present.
Attorney Kathryn Quetel for the plaintiff.
Defendant Edouard Bournendil is present.
Attorney Thomas Loran III appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Neil Bardack, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of MAY-20-2013 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
